summary: Full backend + frontend re-testing after pod restart (OOM). All 10 backend tests pass. URL ingest (POST /api/documents/ingest-url) works with httpbin.org returning 200 + chunk_count:7. SSE streaming (POST /api/chat/stream) returns proper SSE token events. All frontend elements verified: URL ingest input/button, mode switcher, tabs, no emergent badge.

issues: Recharts console warnings: chart width/height = 0/-1 on initial render (cosmetic, chart likely renders once container has size)

critical_code_review_comments: Disk /root is 100% full (9.8G). Cleared pip cache to free 2.8G. This may cause issues if model caches grow.
Chart width/height warning in console for Document Map — minor cosmetic issue
seed_data_creation: 3 docs in DB: 2x test_ai.txt (from backend tests), 1x httpbin.org (from URL ingest test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All APIs functional including URL ingest and SSE streaming. Frontend fully verified: URL ingest input (data-testid=url-ingest-input), URL ingest btn (data-testid=url-ingest-btn), mode switcher (Hybrid/Vector/Keyword), tabs (Chat/Compare Docs/Document Map).
